title: A week with the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2: Big, bright and sometimes helpful - Engadget
summary: It's been two years since Samsung launched the Galaxy Watch Ultra , which was heavily reminiscent of the Apple Watch Ultra . First, here's a quick rundown of what's new on the Watch Ultra 2.
